title: Genetic exploration of Dravet syndrome: two case report.
summary: A case series of two Indonesian children with Dravet syndrome, focusing on genetic analysis using next-generation sequencing to identify mutations in the SCN1A gene and other genes.
key_findings: Patient 1 had heterozygous deletion mutations in TTC21B, SCN1A, and SCN9A.
Patient 2 had a mutation in the SCN1A gene.
Clinical severity correlated with genetic mutation severity.
